chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Next we are going to discuss some more mathematical functions which exist in our numpy

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: There are many mathematical functions for variety of computation in numpy

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: It is not possible to study all of them at once and in fact it does not make much sense

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: What we will do is that the important mathematical functions which we will use the most while writing and implementing our algorithms

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We will discuss them now and if there is any other additional numpy function which we will use later then we will discuss it there

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: First of all, let's talk about our aggregation functions

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Aggregation functions work on all the elements of our numpy

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Like we have sum, we have product, prod to multiply all of the values, min and max

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Let's look at the implementation of these mathematical functions

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: First of all, let's talk about our sum function or aggregation functions

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We are talking about aggregation functions

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Let's create a simple array

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: numpy.array with simple values 1,2,3,4,5

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And we will start performing our functions on this array one by one

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: First of all, we will perform numpy.sum function on this array

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: What happens with numpy.sum is that we get some aggregated single output of all the values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So in aggregation functions we get some single output

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So we get this which is equal to 15 which is the sum of all of the values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Similarly, we can calculate the product

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Product of all of the values will be 120

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Multiply all the values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: You can also pause the lecture here and try to solve it on your own with paper and pen

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So we will clarify that we are getting the same answer

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Along with that, we also have a function which is called min

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Min function returns minimum value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So minimum value is 1

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Similarly, we have max which returns maximum value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We have max

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Now as we have min and max

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Similarly, we have a function called argmin

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: argmin is this function

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: argmin basically returns the index of our minimum value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And argmax returns the index of maximum value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: For example, if I do argmin

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And similarly if we do argmax

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Minimum value which is 1 is at index 0

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So it is at index 0

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Maximum value which is 5 is at index 4

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: This value is at index 4

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Along with that, we also have the min function

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We have already seen min

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: The mean of this array is 3k equal

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We have the standard deviation function

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Standard deviation of this array is going to be 1.41

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: We also have median

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Median means when we arrange our array in sorted order

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Lower to higher values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So which will be the middle value from that?

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Middle value is going to be 3

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So our median value will also be 3k equal

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: As we have mean and standard deviation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Similarly, we have something called variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: There is a particular formula to get the variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: For variance, we use this function

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So this is the function for calculating variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: To get the variance means

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Every value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Let's suppose our value is x

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And these are our values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: This is x0

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: This is x1

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: This is x2

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So we can say that every value is xi

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: From xi, we minus our mean

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And if we take square of all these values

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And divide it by n

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So this value is called variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And if we notice in the formula of standard deviation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: If we take under root of variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So we will have standard deviation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And if under root is not there in the value

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Then it becomes variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So standard deviation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Which is the mathematical symbol of standard deviation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Which is this symbol

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: Which we call sigma

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And variance can be called sigma square in a way

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So in this way, we calculate our variation

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: And standard deviation is a very related formula of variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: So if I try and print the variance

chunks.title: Mathematical
chunks.text: The variance is going to be 2

Middle value is going to be 3 So our median value will also be 3k equal As we have mean and standard deviation Similarly, we have something called variance There is a particular formula to get the variance For variance, we use this function So this is the function for calculating variance To get the variance means Every value Let's suppose our value is x And these are our values 1, 2, 3, 4, 5 This is x0 This is x1 This is x2 So we can say that every value is xi From xi, we minus our mean And if we take square of all these values And divide it by n So this value is called variance And if we notice in the formula of standard deviation If we take under root of variance So we will have standard deviation And if under root is not there in the value Then it becomes variance So standard deviation Which is the mathematical symbol of standard deviation Which is this symbol Which we call sigma And variance can be called sigma square in a way So in this way, we calculate our variation And standard deviation is a very related formula of variance So if I try and print the variance The variance is going to be 2
